{{Infobox technique
| name = Akura bloodline armor
| introduced = Wintersteel
}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Akura bloodline armor]] puts great pressure on the user's spirit and is difficult to control.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c5">''Wintersteel'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Akura bloodline armor]] is notoriously difficult to control and makes the user clumsy and slow when summoned over the entire body.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c16">''Wintersteel'', chapter 16</ref>}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Akura bloodline armor]] grows in size and puts a burden on the spirit.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c20">''Bloodline'', chapter 20</ref>}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Yerin's Goldsigns]] chipped pieces of [[Akura bloodline armor]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c27">''Waybound'', chapter 27</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
